title: PhD
biography: Barbara McClintock was an American geneticist who discovered genetic transposition (jumping genes), demonstrating that the genome is far more dynamic than previously believed. Nobel Prize 1983.
aiSummary: Barbara McClintock is a genetics specialist at Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory. Based in Cold Spring Harbor.
